## Pull Request Template

### Description of Changes
<!-- Briefly describe what you changed and why -->
- [ ] Include a clear description of the changes
- [ ] Explain the motivation for these changes
- [ ] Mention any related issues or context

### Type of Change
<!-- Mark the appropriate type -->
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Test
- [ ] Other (please describe):

### Checklist
<!-- Mark the appropriate items -->
- [ ] I have read the [Contributing Guidelines](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally
- [ ] I have added tests if applicable
- [ ] I have updated documentation if necessary
- [ ] I have run the linter/style checker
- [ ] My changes follow the project's coding style
- [ ] I have checked that the code works as expected on the target devices

### Related Issues
<!-- Link to any related issues -->
Closes: #<issue_number>
Related to: #<issue_number>

### Screenshots (if applicable)
<!-- Add screenshots to help reviewers understand your changes -->
<!-- You can add screenshots using the image syntax: ![description](path/to/image.png) -->

### Additional Context
<!-- Add any other context about the pull request here -->
